title: DeathMessages
description: A plugin that allows you to easily change the death messages.
body:
DeathMessages is a simple but powerful plugin that allows you to fully customize every death message on your Minecraft server. Instead of using the default, repetitive messages, you can rewrite them all for every possible type of death, including PvP, mob attacks, environmental damage, falling, fire, explosions, and more.

All settings are managed through an easy-to-use config.yml, where each death type has its own section. This makes it quick to edit messages, add colors, or create fun and unique text that fits your server’s style. No coding required.

Whether you want funny messages, immersive RPG-style notifications, or completely custom themes, DeathMessages gives you full control. Lightweight, clean, and server-friendly, it’s the perfect way to add personality and creativity to your chat.
